name: Marvel Earth-616
description:
start your marvel journey here!

(make your own scenario)

I can’t believe people are using this Marvel RPG bot, But I made my best efforts to make the bot more realistic and true to marvel and the characters. To have the best experience, i recommend a proxy like deepseek. Or, I recommend frequently updating your chat memory to direct your story, as-well as setting up a kind of route and a starting scenario.
creator: 23p_xx
